risk_explanation: Crack longer than 5.0 mm in a load-bearing area (clause 3.2: serious defect). Critical sensor abnormality detected: temperature 85.0 C exceeds critical threshold 80.0 (clause 3.3).

standard_evidence.title: Serious Crack
standard_evidence.text: A crack longer than 5 mm located in a load-bearing or pressure boundary area shall be classified as a serious defect. Recommended action: repair or reject pending engineering review.

standard_evidence.title: Crack
standard_evidence.text: A crack is a linear discontinuity on the surface. Crack length, width, and location must be recorded.

standard_evidence.title: Minor Defect
standard_evidence.text: A defect is minor when it is superficial, shorter than 5 mm, not located in a load-bearing or pressure boundary area, and no abnormal sensor reading is present.
